improvement: Added a fail-closed adapter that permits replay comparison only after the retained ledger passes authentication, freshness, schema, and entry-structure checks.

verification.method: isolated Node test run using byte-equivalent committed logic
cases: matching active digest detected without emitting candidate or digest
non-match reported only after ledger acceptance
empty and oversized candidates rejected before comparison

trust_limit: A replay match shows only that the candidate digest occurs in the accepted active ledger. A non-match does not prove global uniqueness, ledger completeness, atomic insertion, deployment success, diagnosis, treatment efficacy, or claim truth.
falsification_route: Provide an authenticated fresh ledger containing a valid active digest for the candidate and show the adapter returns replay_detected=false, or provide a rejected ledger and show comparison_performed=true.
